title: OpenClaw Resolver Description Catalog
description: Tool + skill descriptions consumed by the classifier's system prompt. Used for both the shipped defaults (default-catalog.json) and the operator-writable override file (catalogOverridesFile).

tools.description: Map of tool ID to description string. Keys match runtime-exposed tool IDs (e.g. 'nodes', 'web_search').

skills.description: Map of skill ID to description string. Keys match runtime-exposed skill IDs.

_meta.description: Optional metadata for operators (not read by the plugin).
